turns.assistantContent:
Now I have the full picture. This is a 4/4 complexity project: 15 skills, 204 files, 11 agent contracts, cross-skill references, templates, tests, and scripts. The previous session made significant enhancements but the user needs full consistency verification across the entire pack.

Let me establish the plan and start the investigation wave.
